title: Inbox Triage Pro
problem: People lose hours sorting email and miss urgent threads.
quality_tests: Correctly ranks urgent emails in test mailbox

title: Calendar Conflict Resolver
problem: Overlapping events and poor scheduling create missed meetings.
quality_tests: Detects 100% of overlapping events in fixture

title: Meeting Brief Builder
problem: Teams enter meetings without shared context and waste time.
quality_tests: Includes prior action items when available

title: Research Citation Packager
problem: Users need fast, source-backed answers but struggle with citation formatting.
quality_tests: Every factual claim has at least one citation
Citation format passes style lint checks

title: Expense Receipt Organizer
problem: Freelancers and small teams lose receipts and miss reimbursement windows.
quality_tests: CSV export imports cleanly into common accounting tools
Duplicate receipt detection works on sample set

title: Travel Itinerary Concierge
problem: Trip details are fragmented across confirmations and messages.
quality_tests: Timeline is ordered by local timezone
Checklist updates when delays are detected

title: Job Application Accelerator
problem: Applicants spend too long customizing resumes and cover letters per role.
quality_tests: Tailoring suggestions map to user experience

title: Codebase Onboarding Guide
problem: New developers take too long to understand unfamiliar repositories.

title: PR Review Summarizer
problem: Large pull requests overwhelm reviewers and delay merges.

title: Incident Postmortem Writer
problem: Teams struggle to write clear postmortems after outages.
quality_tests: Action items have owners and due dates

title: Contract Redline Assistant
problem: Small teams miss risky clauses in vendor and client contracts.

title: Policy & SOP Generator
problem: Operations teams need consistent SOPs but documentation is fragmented.

title: Social Content Repurposer
problem: Creators need to transform long-form content into channel-ready posts quickly.

title: Ad Copy A/B Tester
problem: Marketing teams waste budget on weak ad variants.

title: SEO Content Optimizer
problem: Writers need practical SEO improvements without keyword stuffing.

title: Customer Feedback Clusterer
problem: Product teams cannot quickly extract trends from large feedback volumes.
quality_tests: Severity score correlates with ticket urgency

title: Support Ticket Autoprioritizer
problem: Support queues lack triage consistency and SLA misses increase.
quality_tests: Priority labels hit benchmark precision threshold
SLA breach predictions are accurate on holdout set

title: On-call Handoff Assistant
problem: Critical context is lost between on-call shifts.
quality_tests: Handoff includes open alerts and owners
Pending actions remain linked to ticket IDs
No stale incidents appear in summary

title: Database Migration Guard
problem: Schema migrations can cause downtime and data integrity issues.
quality_tests: Rollback plan references exact migration IDs
Preflight validates backups and replication health

title: API Change Impact Analyzer
problem: API changes break downstream clients without early warning.
quality_tests: Consumer map includes internal + external clients

title: Docs-to-FAQ Converter
problem: Documentation is comprehensive but hard for users to scan quickly.
quality_tests: FAQ answers remain faithful to source docs

title: Learning Path Designer
problem: Learners struggle to sequence resources for skill development.
quality_tests: Curriculum maps to stated goal level
Plan adapts when learner pace changes

title: Fitness Plan Adapter
problem: Generic workout plans fail when schedules or energy levels change.
quality_tests: Weekly volume stays within safe thresholds

title: Meal Prep Planner
problem: Households waste food due to poor meal planning and shopping mismatch.
quality_tests: Leftover reuse covers at least 2 follow-up meals

title: Budget Guardrails Coach
problem: Users overspend because budgets are static and not behavior-aware.
quality_tests: Alerts avoid false positives under threshold

title: Subscription Leak Finder
problem: Recurring charges accumulate unnoticed and drain budgets.
quality_tests: Finds recurring merchants across statement formats

title: Home Maintenance Scheduler
problem: Homeowners miss periodic tasks and face avoidable repairs.
quality_tests: Log entries are searchable by asset

title: Event Runbook Orchestrator
problem: Small teams run events with scattered checklists and missed dependencies.
quality_tests: Role matrix has no unassigned critical tasks

title: Podcast Show Notes Generator
problem: Creators spend too much time turning recordings into publish-ready notes.

title: Community Moderation Coach
problem: Community managers need consistent moderation decisions and tone.
quality_tests: Drafts cite the relevant policy rule
Escalation path triggers for high-risk cases
